text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after we've reached a break in our
activities, we finally go on our trip of rest and
relaxation.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wow, they've got carbonated water and natural
mineral deposits... Japanese hot springs sure have
a lot goin' on.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I can smell the hot spring all the way from here.
Hehe, I can't wait to jump in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Phew... The water felt great.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I like sharin' the big bath with everyone back at
the dorm, but it's nice to get a long soak in alone.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: It warms you right down to the core.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh man, it's time for dinner already. Let's go,
Teach.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Whoa! This stuff tastes amazing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon is thrilled with the luxurious
banquet.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what they use to make this savory
custard? I feel like the base is made from bonito...
Or maybe it's kelp?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Then again, maybe there's somethin' special about the eggs they used. Dang it, how does this taste so good?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yeah... All right, time for a new challenge!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna nail this recipe once we're back home!
You better look forward to tastin' it, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We cheerfully enjoy our meal.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm stuffed.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, care for a light walk now that we're all filled
up?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We decide to take a walk to help the food digest.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, the breeze feels great! The air is crisp, the
sky's beautiful, and everything is so peaceful.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Being here reminds me of home.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, those were the good ol' days. I used to go
on walks with my family, just like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We walk down the rural road, the two of us
gazing up at the night sky.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Teach?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You know, when I won that raffle, I kinda invited
you here on a whim.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But looking back on it now, I made the right
choice.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Um, I'm not good with words, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm not really sure why I chose to invite you out of
everyone. I mean, I have so many important
friends in my life.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's everyone in Miho Dormitory, and I owe
Fuji Kiseki a lot. Oh, and there's Brian too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've spent as much time with them back at the
academy as I have with you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: So, I wonder why...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon turns her eyes heavenward as she
searches for the right words.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
After taking that nice bath, having some delicious
food, and standing here, staring happily up at the
sky...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've realized that this view is wonderful only
because you're here to see it with me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: It's vast, beautiful, and full of hope.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...It looks a lot like the one I saw with my family in
the past.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, listen to me bein' all cheesy and out of
character! Fuji's corniness might be rubbing off on
me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Let's head back before the cold gets to us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks a little red in the face as she walks off
in a hurry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Hishi Amazon and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
